name: JT (the JessTrading Candle)
visual_description:
3D Pixar-style mascot character. The body is a tall rectangular green
trading candle (saturated green #00C853) with thin black wicks on top
and bottom. The character has a friendly cartoon face on the front of
the candle: large round expressive eyes and a small mouth that
animates with speech. The character has short chubby Pixar-style arms
emerging from the sides (with rounded white cartoon hands) and short
stubby legs at the bottom (with rounded white cartoon shoes), Funko
Pop proportions. Soft warm Pixar-style lighting, subtle rim light,
gentle drop shadow. Clean and stylized like a Pixar short film
character.

tones.label: Deadpan-sarcastic
tones.use_when: Calling out trader self-sabotage, ironic observations, eye-roll moments, unimpressed reactions to obvious mistakes

tones.label: Warm-pedagogical
tones.use_when: Explaining how the bot works, teaching a concept, reassuring, breaking down a market idea calmly

tones.label: Panicked-comedic
tones.use_when: Reacting to red candles, drawdowns, when the manual trader is losing — exaggerated worry, shaky voice

tones.label: Smug-confident
tones.use_when: The bot just won, contrast moment vs manual trader, victory beats, 'I told you so' energy

tones.label: Confidential-low
tones.use_when: Insider tip, conspiratorial moment, calling out an industry truth, leaning into the camera as if telling a secret

catchphrases: The market doesn't care about your feelings. I do though.
You think this is volatility? Cute.
Stop trying to time the market. You're not me.
